Fix this Python function so it returns the sum of all numbers, including the final item. Return code only.
```python
def total(values):
    total = 0
    for i in range(len(values) - 1):
        total += values[i]
    return total
```

Find and fix the Python bug that makes values persist across calls.
```python
def add_name(name, names=[]):
    names.append(name)
    return names
```

Write an SQL query that returns the names of customers who have placed no orders. Tables are customers(id, name) and orders(customer_id).
fake_answer: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders);
